task.summary: Updated term_page.dart to match teammate's version

MESSAGE.value: Updated term_page.dart to match teammate's version

feat: Implement customer and owner modules with Firebase integration
This commit introduces a comprehensive set of features for both customer and owner user roles, including authentication, product management, order processing, and various UI screens.
### Core App Structure - Initializes the Flutter application with Firebase. - Adds a splash screen (`logo.dart`) that navigates to a role-selection `welcome.dart` screen.
### Authentication & User Management - Implements separate login flows for customers (`login.dart`) and owners (`owners_login.dart`). - Adds a unified sign-up page (`sign_in.dart`) for new customers, including a terms and conditions agreement step (`term_page.dart`). - Includes a "Forgot Password" feature (`forgetpassword.dart`) using Firebase Auth's password reset email. - Adds a profile editing screen (`profileeditpage.dart`).
### Customer-Facing Features - **Homepage & Navigation:** Creates a tabbed `customerhomepage.dart` with Home, Search, Cart, and Profile tabs. - **Product Discovery:** - `customerhomepage.dart` displays featured products and browsable categories. - Implements product searching by name and category (`search.dart`, `searchresult.dart`). - Adds product category/subcategory browsing screens (`subcategories_screen.dart`, `homeoffice_decor.dart`). - **Product Details & Customization:** - `productdetail.dart` shows comprehensive product information, including a 3D model viewer. - `customize.dart` allows users to select product options like color and size and add items to the cart. - Introduces a robust `model_viewer_screen.dart` with platform-specific helpers to handle `gs://` and `http://` URLs, including a WebView fallback. - **Cart & Orders:** - `cartpage.dart` allows users to view, manage quantities, and checkout items. - `customerorder.dart` and `orderhistory.dart` provide order tracking for customers. - `order_status.dart` shows live status updates for a specific order.
### Owner/Admin Features - **Dashboard:** Implements an owner-specific dashboard (`ownerdashboard.dart`) with quick links, sales overviews, and new order alerts. - **Product & Category Management:** - `addproduct.dart` enables adding/editing products with image and 3D model uploads. - `addcategory.dart` and `addsubcategory.dart` provide interfaces for managing the product hierarchy. - `edit_category.dart` and `edit_subcategory.dart` allow for updating existing categories. - **Inventory & Expenses:** - `inventory_page.dart` tracks pre-made products and raw materials. - `expensepage.dart` and `expense_details.dart` manage business expenses and link them to orders. - **Customer Suggestions:** `suggestions_page.dart` provides a view for owners to review customer-submitted ideas.
### Backend & Data Models - Adds `firebase_options.dart` to configure Firebase for multiple platforms. - Defines a `product_model.dart` for consistent data handling. - Implements helper files for Firebase Storage uploads (`file_upload_helper_io.dart`, `file_upload_helper_web.dart`) and safe image loading (`safe_network_image.dart`).
